content_body: Our rest and relaxation has truly been amazing. We were blessed to take this trip with our children and niece/nephew. The kids were speechless and so excited to spend time in the "Man Cave" (bottom level) as they call it. Thank you for opening your beautiful home to all of the guests and guests to come. We are definitely making plans for an adult trip with family and friends. We enjoyed the sites but stayed in mostly inside as we're from the Sunshine State and the cold was a bit much. We danced, sung, played board games, and became champions at the billiards table. The memories shared and made were unforgettable.
title: Unforgettable Memories
